mapper.select: /* wms-inbound-order-receive-sql-oracle.xml - selectInterfaceInboundHeaderReceive - 입고 헤더 수신 인터페이스 조회 */ SELECT CTKEY , OWKEY , ORHDKEY , EXTORDERKEY , REQORDERNO , IBHDDATE , IBHDTYPECD , ACKEY , ACNAME , CMT1 , CMT2 , PRCSYN , PRCSDATE , RCVDATE , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY FROM TWORK_INTF_IB_HD_RCV WHERE CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OWKEY = #{owkey} AND ORHDKEY = #{orhdkey}

/* wms-inbound-order-receive-sql-oracle.xml - selectInterfaceInboundHeaderList - 입고 헤더 수신 인터페이스 - 등록 대상 조회 */ SELECT CTKEY , OWKEY , ORHDKEY , EXTORDERKEY , REQORDERNO , IBHDDATE , IBHDTYPECD , ACKEY , ACNAME , CMT1 , CMT2 , PRCSYN , PRCSDATE , RCVDATE , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY FROM TWORK_INTF_IB_HD_RCV WHERE CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OWKEY = #{owkey} AND PRCSYN = 'N' AND TO_DATE(RCVDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') + INTERVAL '1' DAY > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

/* wms-inbound-order-receive-sql-oracle.xml - selectInterfaceInboundDetailList - 입고 상세 수신 인터페이스 - 등록 대상 조회 */ SELECT CTKEY , OWKEY , ORHDKEY , ORDTKEY , EXTORDERKEY , EXPORDERLINENO , DLVYCNTRUNIT , REQORDERUNIT , ICKEY , INITQTY , EXPCTQTY , UOM , PRCSYN , PRCSDATE , RCVDATE , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY FROM TWORK_INTF_IB_DT_RCV WHERE CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OWKEY = #{owkey} AND ORHDKEY = #{orhdkey}

/* wms-inbound-order-receive-sql-oracle.xml - selectMstAsrt - 입고 상세 수신 인터페이스 - 아소트 조회 */ SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT ASRT.CTKEY , ASRT.OWKEY , ASRT.ASRTMASICKEY AS ICKEY , 'Y' AS ASRTWKTGTYN , IO.ICKEY AS IOICKEY FROM TWORK_MST_ASRT ASRT LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_MST_IC IO ON ASRT.ASRTDTICKEY = IO.ICKEY AND IO.MASICYN = 'Y' WHERE ASRT.QTY > 0 AND IO.ICKEY IS NULL GROUP BY ASRT.CTKEY , ASRT.OWKEY , ASRT.ASRTMASICKEY , IO.ICKEY HAVING COUNT(1) > 1 ) WHERE CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OWKEY = #{owkey} AND ICKEY = #{ickey}
